comment.body:
I drew some lines on a chart.
Mostly, I just thought that it looked nice.
No idea about timing; I guess the idea is that vol will begin to increase at some point.
Right now, all "DM" vol is dead (not 2017 stock index r-vol dead, but effectively dead, and mis-priced).
"DM" rates vol is dead (the underlying emperor's clothes); "DM" FX vol is dead; "DM" stock index vol is quiet, with no froth at new highs; Silver and Gold alive, and probably more to come there.
We've had DM Central Banks in control for so long (decades), as we imported deflation from China, that I think we all forgot what "normal" volatility is.
At some point (this year I think) all assets will begin to move, and vol will mean-revert upwards.
Right now, NVDA, *the* terra-cap, is moving between round number price strikes, like BTC or ETH.
It feels like a Wile E. Coyote suspended animation moment.
Not that vol will suddenly explode (unless there are exogenous shocks), but that the "bet on nothing happening", and "stop the dip" behavior will subside, gradually at first, and then more quickly; and this will affect all asset classes.
All that said, I'm here because I'm grateful for what Alma says, and what all of you say.
